sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: FibroBiologics stock tumbles on reverse stock split plan By Investing.com
feed.summary: FibroBiologics Inc. (NASDAQ: FBLG) shares fell 22.2% in after-hours trading after announcing a 1-for-20 reverse stock split. The split, effective March 30, 2026, aims to help the company regain compliance with Nasdaq's minimum bid price requirement and attract broader investor interest. Stockholders had previously approved the reverse split on February 20, 2026.

feed.title: Rockwell Automation Showcases Autonomous Industrial Operations at Hannover Messe 2026 | Corporate
feed.summary: Rockwell Automation will showcase its autonomous industrial operations at Hannover Messe 2026, focusing on how manufacturers can accelerate their journey from automation to autonomy using industrial AI, embedded intelligence, and secure architectures. The company will demonstrate practical applications, AI-enabled smart machines, and self-adjusting systems aimed at boosting productivity and improving quality. Rockwell's presentation will highlight its production-ready approach to industrial AI, supporting digital transformation and real-time optimization.

feed.title: Daymark Wealth Partners LLC Sells 2,443 Shares of Lockheed Martin Corporation $LMT
feed.summary: Daymark Wealth Partners LLC reduced its stake in Lockheed Martin Corporation (NYSE:LMT) by 25.1% in the fourth quarter, selling 2,443 shares and retaining 7,271 shares valued at $3.517 million. Despite Lockheed Martin missing its estimated EPS for the quarter, the company saw a 9.1% revenue increase and positive demand catalysts, including new Pentagon framework agreements and a plan to quadruple Precision Strike Missile production. The stock has a "Hold" average analyst rating with a consensus target price of $623.16, and declared a quarterly dividend of $3.45 per share.

feed.title: Daymark Wealth Partners LLC Has $2.48 Million Stake in Netflix, Inc. $NFLX

feed.title: Focus Financial Network Inc. Raises Stake in Netflix, Inc. $NFLX

Despite positive sentiment around ad revenue and new content strategies, analysts note valuation concerns and significant insider selling.

feed.title: Tractor Supply History: From Mail-Order to Retail Giant
feed.summary: Tractor Supply Company began in 1938 as a mail-order tractor parts business founded by Charles E. Schmidt in Minot, North Dakota, addressing the need for accessible parts for farmers. It quickly expanded to retail stores and diversified its offerings beyond just parts to become a comprehensive agricultural and rural lifestyle retailer. The company's growth was further cemented when it went public in 1959, reaching $10 million in sales and solidifying its role as a crucial supplier to rural America.

feed.title: The Zacks Analyst Blog Highlights Amazon.com, TJX Companies, Eaton, Blue Ridge and Security Federal
feed.summary: Zacks Equity Research highlights Amazon.com, TJX Companies, Eaton Corp. plc, Blue Ridge Bankshares, Inc., and Security Federal Corp. in its latest Analyst Blog. The article provides research reports for these companies, discussing their recent performance, competitive advantages, and potential challenges. Key factors like AI integration for Amazon, the resilient off-price model for TJX, and strong demand for Eaton are detailed, while Blue Ridge and Security Federal's market positions are also analyzed.

feed.title: Everest hires AXIS Re’s Jason Busti as Head of North America Treaty Reinsurance
feed.summary: Everest Group has appointed Jason Busti as its new Head of North America Treaty Reinsurance. Busti joins from AXIS Re, where he served as President of North America, and will be responsible for leading Everest's treaty reinsurance business across the US, Bermuda, and Canada. Jill Beggs, EVP and CEO of Reinsurance at Everest, highlighted Busti's deep understanding of the market and strong client relationships as key assets for the role.

feed.title: CoStar Data Show a Surge in Occupier Demand for Southbank East Offices
feed.summary: CoStar data reveals that Southbank East has reversed two years of demand losses, achieving positive absorption in Q4 2025 with over 200,000 sq ft in annual net absorption, its strongest quarterly performance in over a decade. Despite a rise in vacancy rates to a 12-year high of 11.5% at the beginning of 2025 due to new developments, occupier demand is increasing, especially for larger floorplates where vacancy is only 8.3%. New developments are also showing improved pre-let performance compared to Central London.

feed.title: F5 Elevates to Gold Membership in the Cloud Native Computing Foundation
feed.summary: F5 has upgraded to Gold Membership in the Cloud Native Computing Foundation (CNCF), strengthening its commitment to open source cloud-native innovation. This move enhances F5's collaboration on key projects like OpenTelemetry and Kubernetes Ingress, focusing on secure networking, application delivery, and AI-driven observability. F5 aims to empower organizations with tools for modern application infrastructures, including AI workloads on Kubernetes.

feed.title: Oracle (ORCL) price target lowered on revenue conversion concerns
feed.summary: This article provides a brief update on Oracle (ORCL), stating that its price target has been lowered due to concerns about revenue conversion. The full content of the article is not available in the provided text.

feed.title: Zacks Industry Outlook Highlights Agnico ArcelorMittal, Nucor and Steel Dynamics
feed.summary: The Zacks Steel Producers industry faces challenges from muted demand in major markets like automotive and residential construction, along with sluggishness in China's property market. However, higher steel prices and a resilient commercial construction sector provide some tailwinds. Companies like ArcelorMittal, Nucor, and Steel Dynamics are highlighted for their strategic positioning, including expansion, cost optimization, investment in growth projects, and capacity upgrades, despite the overall "gloomy near-term" industry outlook indicated by a Zacks Industry Rank of #225.

feed.title: HB Fuller announces global price hike of at least 10% starting April 2026
feed.summary: HB Fuller, a leading adhesive manufacturer, has announced an upcoming global price increase of at least 10% on most of its adhesive products. This adjustment is set to take effect starting April 2026 and is primarily driven by rising raw material, labor, and transportation costs. The company cites significant inflationary pressures as the reason for needing to pass on these costs to customers.

feed.title: CCM Investment Advisers LLC Increases Stock Holdings in Synopsys, Inc. $SNPS
feed.summary: CCM Investment Advisers LLC has significantly increased its stake in Synopsys, Inc. (NASDAQ:SNPS) by 30.0% in the fourth quarter, now owning 25,128 shares valued at $11.803 million. This increase comes as Synopsys reported strong Q4 results, beating EPS and revenue estimates, and provided positive FY2026 guidance. The company is also benefiting from increased AI and data center growth expectations due to a collaboration with Arm on an AGI data-center CPU and a multibillion-dollar activist stake taken by Elliott Investment Management.

feed.title: After five years at AA, Fosun reaches MSCI's top AAA ESG rating
feed.summary: Fosun International's MSCI ESG rating has been upgraded from AA to AAA, its highest since 2021, reflecting strengthened ESG governance and climate commitments like carbon neutrality by 2050. This achievement follows five years of sustained efforts and integrates ESG principles deeply into its corporate strategy. The company also received recognition from other authoritative institutions such as S&P Global and FTSE Russell for its sustainability performance.

feed.title: Caterpillar Inc. $CAT Shares Sold by CCM Investment Advisers LLC

Despite recent insider selling totaling $94.33 million and some analyst caution regarding valuation and margins, Caterpillar beat Q4 earnings estimates and benefits from significant demand for power generation in data centers and AI campuses.

feed.title: FCPI Stock Fund Price and Chart — CBOE:FCPI
feed.summary: This article provides a comprehensive overview of the Fidelity Stocks for Inflation ETF (FCPI), detailing its price, chart, key statistics like AUM and expense ratio, and investment strategy. It explains that FCPI invests in large- and mid-cap US equities designed to perform well in inflationary environments, with a focus on sectors like energy and materials. The article also includes technical analysis, seasonal data, and a frequently asked questions section covering various aspects of the ETF for potential investors.

feed.title: Bank of Montreal (BMO) Price Target Raised on Strong Banking Growth
feed.summary: Raymond James reaffirmed its Outperform rating and CAD$214 price target for Bank of Montreal (BMO) following a robust quarter. BMO reported adjusted earnings per share of CAD$3.48 and revenue of CAD$9.82 billion, both exceeding forecasts, driven by strong growth in Canadian Personal & Commercial Banking and U.S. Banking segments. The bank anticipates EPS between $2.40 and $2.72 for upcoming quarters, with full-year fiscal 2026 revenue projected at $27.88 billion and fiscal 2027 revenue at $28.93 billion.

feed.title: Royal Caribbean to swap ships on Southampton summer 2027 sailings
feed.summary: Royal Caribbean will replace Mariner of the Seas with the larger Freedom of the Seas for its Southampton summer 2027 sailings, citing strong guest resonance with the Freedom Class. This change means Freedom of the Seas' previously scheduled Miami cruises between May and September 2027 have been canceled, with affected guests offered alternative cruises or full refunds. Itinerary details for the new Southampton departures will be announced later.

Other institutional investors like Vanguard Group, State Street Corp, and Nordea Investment Management also adjusted their positions. Despite recent insider selling and a slight dip in stock price, analysts maintain a "Moderate Buy" rating with an average price target of $192.61, citing strong subscription revenue growth and increasing AI adoption as key positives for ServiceNow.

feed.title: Flutter (FLUT) Rated Outperform on Betting Market Expansion
feed.summary: Flutter Entertainment plc (FLUT) has received an Outperform rating from Citizens, who maintained a $195 price target based on the company's plans to expand its prediction market platform and increase marketing spend to over $300 million by 2026 for events like the World Cup. This positive outlook comes despite Bernstein SocGen Group reducing its price target from $170 to $125 due to increasing competition for Flutter's FanDuel brand in the US online sports betting market. Flutter operates various online sports betting and gaming brands internationally, including FanDuel, Betfair, and Paddy Power.

feed.title: Ground Support Equipment Market Set to Boom Rapidly, Witnessing Strong Growth Through 2033 | Oshkosh Aerotech LLC, Textron Inc, TCR Group
feed.summary: A new report by Coherent Market Insights Pvt. Ltd. forecasts robust growth for the Ground Support Equipment (GSE) market through 2033, with detailed global, regional, and country-level insights. The study analyzes competitive landscapes, technological developments, and investment opportunities, segmenting the market by type, equipment, application, and ownership. Key players highlighted include Oshkosh Aerotech LLC, Textron Inc., and TCR Group, with the report offering a data-driven analysis to guide executives and investors.

feed.title: Oracle (ORCL) Price Target Lowered on Revenue Conversion Concerns
feed.summary: Argus has reduced its price target for Oracle (ORCL) shares to $225 from $384, while maintaining a Buy rating. The adjustment stems from analyst concerns regarding whether Oracle's improved backlog will successfully convert into actual revenue. Despite this, Oracle exceeded Q3 2026 earnings estimates, reporting $17.2 billion in revenue, driven primarily by an 84% year-over-year increase in Infrastructure as a Service revenue.

feed.title: Equinix Inc. stock faces data center demand surge amid AI boom and global expansion push
feed.summary: Equinix Inc. (EQIX) is experiencing a surge in demand for its data center services, driven by the artificial intelligence boom and global expansion efforts. The company reported strong Q4 results with accelerated bookings from AI-driven workloads and hyperscaler investments. Its global footprint and strategic positioning in edge computing contribute to stable growth and a strong outlook for multi-year expansion, making it an attractive investment for US portfolios.

feed.title: Assenagon Asset Management S.A. Cuts Stock Position in United Airlines Holdings Inc $UAL
feed.summary: Assenagon Asset Management S.A. significantly reduced its stake in United Airlines Holdings Inc by 61.9% in Q4 2025, selling over half a million shares. Despite this, Wall Street analysts generally hold a "Moderate Buy" rating with an average target price of $131.19, though some have lowered targets due to rising fuel costs. United Airlines plans fleet expansion and premium product rollouts, but management has warned of potential fare increases if fuel costs remain elevated.

feed.title: Brady Family Wealth LLC Sells 2,321 Shares of Apple Inc. $AAPL
feed.summary: Brady Family Wealth LLC reduced its stake in Apple Inc. by 2.3% in the fourth quarter, selling 2,321 shares and now holding 100,543 shares valued at $27.334 million, making Apple its largest position at 8.4% of its holdings. Despite this sale, investor sentiment remains largely positive, with 67.73% institutional ownership and a "Moderate Buy" consensus from analysts, supported by Apple's initiatives in monetization and AI. However, the company faces near-term challenges from UK regulatory changes and softer iPhone shipments in China.

feed.title: Avanza Fonder AB Increases Stock Position in The Home Depot, Inc. $HD
feed.summary: Avanza Fonder AB has increased its stake in The Home Depot, Inc. (NYSE:HD) by 4.7% during the fourth quarter, bringing its total holdings to 104,923 shares valued at over $36 million. The home improvement retailer recently announced strong Q4 results, surpassing earnings estimates, and provided positive FY2026 EPS guidance. Analysts generally maintain a "Moderate Buy" rating for HD, citing strategic initiatives like the expansion of its Pro distribution network through acquisitions and new store openings as drivers for long-term growth.

feed.title: Colgate-Palmolive Co stock faces governance scrutiny and dividend boost ahead of 2026 annual meeting
feed.summary: Colgate-Palmolive Co (ISIN: US1941621039) is facing investor scrutiny over a shareholder proposal advocating for an independent board chair, which management opposes, ahead of its May 8, 2026, annual meeting. Simultaneously, the company announced a quarterly dividend increase to $0.53 per share, effective Q2 2026, marking its 62nd consecutive annual hike. These developments unfold against a backdrop of strong Q4 earnings, where EPS and revenue surpassed estimates, leading analysts to maintain a "Moderate Buy" rating with an average price target of $94.75.
